title: helichrysum leontonyx
intro: Helichrysum leontonyx, also known as the yellow-flowered or leontonyx, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family. It is native to the Mediterranean region and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Helichrysum leontonyx include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and relieving pain, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Helichrysum leontonyx can be prepared into herbal teas, oils, and salves, allowing for versatile use in aromatherapy and topical applications.
